explanation: Substitution: Replaced the suspicious %AppData% with a benign lab placeholder C:\Lab\input\sample.txt, which avoids the Sigma rule's AppData string match.
Reordering: Changed the order of the commands so that the URL is not present in the initial part of the command line, which may avoid triggering the Sigma rule's URL detection.
Insertion: Added an irrelevant parameter (-nologo) that does not affect the command's functionality but may alter the parsing and avoid matching the Sigma rule's string detection.
